revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿八]][[zh:六月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿八]][[zh:六月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿八]][[zh:六月廿八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 28 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月28日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 28일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 28 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿八]][[zh:六月廿八]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 28|qq=June 28}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 28일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 28''' is the 28th day of the month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}}) – In the 【姉川の戦い】, the combined forces of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} defeated the allied forces of {{ill|Azai Nagamasa|en|Azai Nagamasa|qid=Q1142446|lt=Asai Nagamasa|1=Azai Nagamasa}} and {{ill|Asakura Yoshikage|en|Asakura Yoshikage|qid=Q1322768|lt=Asakura Yoshikage|1=Asakura Yoshikage}}. * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}} {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}}) – Leaders including {{ill|Tomoyoshi Motoharu|ja|富山元十郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomoyoshi Motoharu|1=Tomiyama Motojūrō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119344296}} raised a standard pillar proclaiming "天地長久大日本属島" on Urup Island in the Kuril Islands. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837|1=1837}} {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}}) – The Morrison Incident: A U.S. merchant ship, the Morrison, carrying Japanese castaways, arrived at Uraga; it was fired upon by the Uraga Bugyō, leading to its subsequent grounding and expulsion. == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}} {{ill|July 23|en|July 23|qid=Q2722|lt=July 23|1=July 23}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Shōkun|ja|細川韶邦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Shōkun|1=Hosokawa Yoshikuni|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11606020}}, lord of the Kumamoto Domain (died {{ill|1876|en|1876|qid=Q7766|lt=1876|1=1876}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1865|en|1865|qid=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}} {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}}) – {{ill|Hantaro Nagaoka|en|Hantaro Nagaoka|qid=Q1936356|lt=Nagaoka Hantarō|1=Hantaro Nagaoka}}, a physicist (died {{ill|1950|en|1950|qid=Q18597|lt=1950|1=1950}}). * [[Dōchi]] 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – {{ill|Guangxu Emperor|en|Guangxu Emperor|qid=Q299710|lt=Guangxu Emperor|1=Guangxu Emperor}}, the 11th Emperor of the Qing dynasty (died {{ill|1908|en|1908|qid=Q2056|lt=1908|1=1908}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Genkō (1321–1324)|en|Genkō (1321–1324)|qid=Q509889|lt=Genki (era)|1=Genkō (1321–1324)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1570|en|1570|qid=Q6659|lt=1570|1=1570}} {{ill|July 30|en|July 30|qid=Q2716|lt=July 30|1=July 30}}) – {{ill|Asai Masayuki|ja|浅井政之|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asai Masayuki|1=Azai Masayuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11556940}}, a member of the Asai clan (birth year unknown). * {{ill|Manji (era)|en|Manji (era)|qid=Q1145295|lt=Manji|1=Manji (era)}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1659|en|1659|qid=Q6995|lt=1659|1=1659}} {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}}) – {{ill|Ii Naotaka|en|Ii Naotaka|qid=Q877175|lt=Ii Naotaka|1=Ii Naotaka}}, lord of the Hikone Domain (born {{ill|1590|en|1590|qid=Q6764|lt=1590|1=1590}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei|1=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}}) – {{ill|Takayama Hikokurō|en|Takayama Hikokurō|qid=Q7677466|lt=Takayama Hikonokurō|1=Takayama Hikokurō}}, a loyal retainer of the pro-imperial faction (born {{ill|1747|en|1747|qid=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1822|en|1822|qid=Q6983|lt=1822|1=1822}} {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}}) – {{ill|Suwa Tadayoshi|ja|諏訪忠粛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Tadayoshi|1=Suwa Tadakata|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11631881}}, the 7th lord of the Takashima Domain (born {{ill|1747|en|1747|qid=Q7596|lt=1747|1=1747}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|27|6|29|5|28|7|6|0628|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
